title: cleome formosa
intro: Cleome formosa, also known as the bee plant or spider flower, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cleome formosa include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as a natural insect repellent. Cleome formosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
